signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026, up from 2.0% in prior months but below 2.4% forecasts | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

This March figure, the most recent reported, shows contained price pressures amid Middle East-driven energy volatility, aligning with the Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook after holding rates at 2.5% for a sixth meeting last week[1][3]. No newer confirmati
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.headline: Top buzz on X from Polymarket traders (last 24h, Latest mode):**
signals.raw: Top buzz on X from Polymarket traders (last 24h, Latest mode):**

signals.headline: **Whale tracking tools & copy trading exploding
signals.raw: **Whale tracking tools & copy trading exploding.** Multiple posts shill real-time trackers/alerts (e.g., @Lummox_eth's tool caught 40+ whale buys on Iran ceasefire pre-Trump announcement, 5-10x gains).[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2045588771358347619) @Chance_ copy trading praised for auto-following top traders (custom scaling, no manual hunting).[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2045536530681217336) **

signals.headline: **Insider/smart money recaps
signals.raw: **Insider/smart money recaps.** Trackers flagged Maduro exfiltration, US-Iran strikes/ceasefire hours early; whales positioned low-prob YES sides.[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2045588771358347619) One profiled trader +$343k/+9.5k via early low-c buys (1-5¢ to 30-90¢), CLOB sniping.[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2045158595331862785)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2045512635802669383) Sports arb: bet befo

signals.headline: **Mispriced arb tips trending
signals.raw: **Mispriced arb tips trending.** Farm spreads (YES+NO>1, buy cheap/hedge); limit orders for vol fills; rotate high-vol short-term markets.[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2045520191522574731) Whales = top 0.77% ($100k+ vol), capture 84% profits.[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2045244144260731390) **No specific markets.** **LOW** actionable now.
